title: Triton
description: The Ultimate FPS Modpack for Fabric 1.21.8
body:
Every real FPS-boosting mod in one pack — no fluff, no filler, just frames. ⚡

🧠 What is Triton?

Triton is a hyper-optimized Fabric modpack built for one thing — maximum FPS.
No gimmicks, no bloat — every mod in this pack actually improves performance.

Whether you’re on a low-end laptop or a high-end PC, Triton squeezes out every frame possible while keeping visuals clean and vanilla-faithful.

⚙️ Requirements

- Minecraft: 1.21.8

- Loader: Fabric

- Java: 17 or newer recommended

💡 Tips

Use F3 → FPS graph to see real-time frame gains.

Add shaders or texture packs freely — Triton focuses on backend performance.

Pair with Mod Menu (optional) for easy settings.

Edit Sodium's NEW Video Settings To Your Liking
 
🧩 Credits

Built with care by the Minecraft optimization community.
Mod authors retain all rights; Triton just curates and configures the best.

💚 Triton is open and maintained — feedback, FPS benchmarks, and suggestions are welcome!
